## Overview

Describe the Sendbird-style API area, then map it to OpenIM server-side resources and workflows. Keep this page focused on server-to-server usage.

## Base URL and authentication

Document `{API_ADDRESS}`, required token or admin credential, token placement, and security requirements.

```http
operationID: <unique-trace-id>
token: <admin-token>
Content-Type: application/json
```

## Request conventions

- HTTP and JSON request/response bodies.
- `operationID` tracing header.
- `token` header for APP administrator calls.
- ID formats and uniqueness rules.
- Millisecond timestamp format and timezone assumptions.
- Pagination, sorting, and filtering conventions.
- Array request field limit: 1000 items.

## Response format

Show the standard success and failure envelope used by this API area.

```json
{
  "errCode": 0,
  "errMsg": "",
  "errDlt": "",
  "data": {}
}
```

## Errors and retries

Explain HTTP status codes, OpenIM business error codes, retryable cases, and idempotency requirements.
